docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REEVES, KELLY KLR COMMUNICATIONS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, SCOTT ERRA, INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, **SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II PLAINTIFF KELLY REVES, KLR COMMUNICATIONS, LLC IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT SCOTT ANDERSON, ERRA, INC. IS PRESENT. GARY ANDERSON, CO-OWNER ALSO TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED IN OPEN COURT AND ARE RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
